rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Command Line Indicating BlackCat Execution

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Command Line Indicating BlackCat Execution
id: df69c374-327e-4146-acff-4a961bb1b755
status: experimental
description: Detects process execution with the --access-token flag accompanied by
  a 64-character alphanumeric string in the space-delimited command-line arguments..
references:
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/06/13/the-many-lives-of-blackcat-ransomware/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/12/04
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.t1204
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains: --access-token
    CommandLine|re: ^.*\s{1}[a-zA-Z0-9]{64}\s{1}.*$
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
